title: 3 Checks to Discern God's Voice
hook: Is that God, my thoughts, or fear? Use these 3 checks.
script: Is that God, my thoughts, or fear? Use these 3 checks. One: Scripture alignment. God will not contradict His Word. Two: Christlike fruit. Does it move you toward love, joy, peace, patience? Three: Wise counsel and Spirit-led peace. Do mature believers affirm it, and does it settle your soul rather than spike panic? Example: 'Text them an apology' aligns with Matthew 5:24 and brings peace. 'Ghost them forever' fails love. Quick prayer: 'Jesus, speak. Your servant is listening.' If it is unclear, wait. God is not threatened by time. Save this for the next decision.

title: When God Feels Silent: Simple Discernment
hook: If God feels silent right now, watch this.
script: If God feels silent right now, watch this. When a thought hits, run it through three checks. Does it agree with Scripture? God's voice will not deny His character. Does it grow Christlike fruit like love, humility, patience? Is there wise counsel and a steady peace, not pressure or panic? Example: 'Quit your job today or you will miss God' creates fear and isolation. That fails peace and counsel. 'Update your resume and seek advice' aligns with wisdom. Pray: 'Lord, guide my steps. I am listening.' Then take the next small obedient step. Save this to revisit when emotions are loud.

title: Stop Overthinking: Hear God with 3 Filters
script: You may be overthinking this. Try the three-fold filter. Check the Word: does the prompting reflect God's heart shown in Scripture? Check the fruit: does it lead toward love, joy, peace, gentleness, self-control, not fear or shame? Check counsel and peace: would a trusted, mature believer nod yes, and do you sense a calm invitation rather than a frantic shove? 'Tell the truth and make it right' passes. 'Hide it and hope no one notices' fails. Whisper: 'Speak, Lord; your servant is listening.' Clarity grows as you obey the light you have. Save this.
